creator: demodog@hotmail.com
text:
I would like to become maintainer for the /net-im/emesene/ port. 
It´s current stable version if now 1.0 but in the portstree it´s still at 0.2 making it very old.

Would like to learn more about FreeBSD and the portstree by taking on this task.

Best regards

Jimmie Andersson, 

Sweden
